title: Uniswap Swindle - Scammer Speaks Out
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by liquidity addition on Uniswap

prevention.rule: Block any tx that adds liquidity immediately after a flash loan

red_flags: Quickly adding liquidity after receiving a flash loan
monitoring_rules: BLOCK_TX_IF FLASHLOAN_BORROW -> ADD_LIQUIDITY in same tx
summary: A scammer exploited Uniswap by taking a flash loan and immediately adding liquidity, which was detected through real-time monitoring.
